title: AN ACT RENAMING THE APARRI SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADE (ASAT) IN APARRI, CAGAYAN INTO THE APARRI POLYTECHNIC INSTITUTE (API)

chunks.text:
108 OG No. 50, 6327 (December 10, 2012)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10227, October 18, 2012 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE APARRI SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADE (ASAT) IN APARRI, CAGAYAN INTO THE APARRI POLYTECHNIC INSTITUTE (API)

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of School.

â The name of the Aparri School of Arts and Trade (ASAT) in the Municipality of Aparri, Province of Cagayan is hereby changed to the Aparri Polytechnic Institute (API).

SEC. 2.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 9, 2011 and July 24, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

OCT 18 2012

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
